chapter_title.en: Description of the Prayer From Its Beginning to Its End

text: 940 - وَ سَأَلَهُ مَنْصُورُ بْنُ يُونُسَ بُزُرْجَ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَتَبَاكَى فِي اَلصَّلاَةِ اَلْمَفْرُوضَةِ حَتَّى يَبْكِيَ فَقَالَ «قُرَّةُ عَيْنٍ وَ اَللَّهِ» وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ «إِذَا كَانَ ذَلِكَ فَاذْكُرْنِي عِنْدَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.940 - Mansur ibn Yunus Buzurj asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a person who strives to cry during the obligatory prayer until tears flow.
Imam (as) replied: "It is a source of great joy, by Allah (swt)."
The Imam also said: "When this happens, remember me in that moment”.
